nasb.text: How much less when you say you do not behold Him, The case is before Him, and you must wait for Him!

esv.text: How much less when you say that you do not see him, that the case is before him, and you are waiting for him!

cnv.text: 更何況你說你不得見他。 你的案件在他面前，你忍耐地等候他吧！

ccb.text: 更何况你说你看不见祂， 你的案子已呈上，在等祂裁决。
